home.title: Sophia Metapolis
home.subtitle: The digital nation where citizenship is identity
home.description: A sovereign digital community founded on principles of transparency, meritocracy, and active participation. Sophia Metapolis is not just a platform — it is a nation with its own governance, citizens with rights and responsibilities, and a unique value proposition in the digital space.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Sophia Metapolis operates under a governance model where archetypal roles (Horus, Sulis, Minerva) represent specific functions: protection/security, well-being/social, and knowledge/wisdom. Founders occupy these roles on a rotating basis.

model.title: Federal model
model.description: The nation is organized in autonomous communities operating under shared principles but with local governance. Circles (professional), guilds (thematic), and chapters (geographic) form the social fabric.

citizenship.title: Citizenship
citizenship.participation: Active participation as a condition for permanence
citizenship.exit: Fair process in case of departure

postulate.title: Apply for citizenship
postulate.intro: Citizenship in Sophia Metapolis is not a product — it is a mutual commitment between the nation and the citizen. Before starting your application, read the Founding Charter and understand what belonging means.

form.handlePlaceholder: Your unique identifier in the nation
form.declarationPrompt: Tell us why you want to belong to Sophia Metapolis
form.declarationHelp: Minimum 200 characters. This declaration becomes part of your civic history if accepted.
form.terms: I accept the basic terms of the Founding Charter

success.title: Application received
success.message: Your application has been received. The governing body will review it and you will receive an email with the result within 7 days.

login.title: Access my wallet
login.magicLinkSent: Check your email — we have sent you an access link.

ecosystem.title: Two events, one ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: X-Ops Conference and X-Ops Summit are the two pillars of the X-Ops ecosystem. Designed for different profiles, they are the same movement from different perspectives.
ecosystem.tagline: If the Conference is where the tech community learns and shares, the Summit is where leaders decide and transform. Same movement, different perspective.

conference.title: X-Ops Conference
conference.description: The reference technical event for DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps, MLOps and Platform Engineering professionals. A horizontal learning space where the community takes center stage.

editions.title: X-Ops Ecosystem 2026
editions.subtitle: A growing movement. In 2026 we take the X-Ops ecosystem to two continents, with the same DNA and adapted to the local context.

madrid.title: X-Ops Madrid 2026

conference.label: X-Ops Conference
conference.venue: Universidad Rey Juan Carlos, Móstoles Campus

madrid.narrative: The consolidated edition. Madrid has been the home of the X-Ops movement since the beginning. In 2026 we expand the format: one day of executive Summit at Fundación Juan XXIII and two days of technical Conference at URJC. One city, a complete ecosystem.

dubai.title: X-Ops Dubai 2026
dubai.narrative: The first edition in the Middle East. Dubai is the technology and financial hub of MENA. We bring the X-Ops DNA to a new continent: the same Summit + Conference format, adapted to an ecosystem where digital transformation moves at Formula 1 speed.

ubication.title: 2026 Venues
ubication.subtitle: Two cities, three spaces. Each venue has been selected to reflect the spirit of the event it hosts.

xops.title: What is X-Ops?
xops.description: X-Ops Conference is a world-class event taking place in Madrid and Dubai. Designed for X-Ops professionals and enthusiasts, it brings together the community behind DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps, MLOps and BizDevOps. Attendees learn from the best, attend keynotes, participate in hands-on workshops, and build valuable connections.

items.devops: Collaboration between development and operations teams.
items.devsecops: Integrates security practices into the DevOps process.
items.aiops: Uses artificial intelligence to improve IT operations.
items.bizdevops: Aligns business objectives with IT operations.

themes.title: Conference Key Themes
themes.description: X-Ops Conference will feature a complete and diverse agenda covering security testing automation, continuous integration, continuous delivery, security monitoring and analysis, secure architectures, and much more.

card1.title: Our Goal
card1.text: The main objective is to bring together experts, industry leaders, developers and security engineers to share knowledge, experiences and best practices in X-Ops. Attendees will learn from the best, participate in hands-on workshops, and build valuable connections.

card2.title: Where & When?
card2.text: X-Ops Conference Madrid 2026 takes place on 20 and 21 November at the Universidad Rey Juan Carlos Auditorium, Móstoles Campus. X-Ops Dubai 2026 is on 17 October. The agenda covers automation, continuous integration, continuous delivery, monitoring and secure architectures.

card3.title: The Future of Work
card3.text: This transformative event brings together experts and makes a significant impact on participants. Attendees gain practical knowledge of the latest X-Ops tools, improving their skills and organisational efficiency. Connections established promote collaborative networks and continuous learning.
